source_text: Clearly marked with "HVD" EV.5.5.2 An Interlock EV.7.8 must Open the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.2.2 when the HVD is removed EV.5.5.3 A dummy connector or similar may be used to restore isolation to meet EV.6.1.2 # EV.5.6 Precharge and Discharge Circuits EV.5.6.1 The Accumulator must contain a Precharge Circuit
